email.subject: One question about your engineering challenges
email.body:
Quick question: what's the biggest friction point in your engineering team today — hiring speed, capacity, or something else?

I ask because Tenacious helps engineering leads solve exactly these problems with senior talent from East Africa, placed in two to three weeks.

Happy to share how if it's relevant.

send_result.subject: One question about your engineering challenges
send_result.body:
Quick question: what's the biggest friction point in your engineering team today — hiring speed, capacity, or something else?

I ask because Tenacious helps engineering leads solve exactly these problems with senior talent from East Africa, placed in two to three weeks.

Happy to share how if it's relevant.

competitors.name: Toptal
competitors.positioning: Premium global freelance network, claims top 3% of talent
competitors.gap: High cost ($150–200/hr) and 2–4 week vetting delay; no East Africa presence
competitors.tenacious_advantage: 40–60% lower cost with equivalent senior quality and 2–3 week placement vs Toptal's 4-week vetting

competitors.name: Andela
competitors.gap: Batch / marketplace model — prospect must self-manage engineers; limited ML/AI specialization depth
competitors.tenacious_advantage: Specialist matching for ML/data roles with individual vetting and a Tenacious delivery lead who manages the engagement

competitors.name: Upwork Enterprise
competitors.positioning: Freelance marketplace with enterprise compliance layer
competitors.gap: Unmanaged — prospect vets, manages, and retains contractors themselves; high coordination overhead at engineering-team scale
competitors.tenacious_advantage: Fully managed model: Tenacious handles vetting, onboarding, and daily management so the engineering team lead can focus on product

competitor_gap_brief.recommended_angle: Cost-effective senior engineering capacity for Wise without the management overhead of a freelance marketplace
competitor_gap_brief.top_gap_summary: No competitor offers Wise the combination of East Africa specialist talent at 40–60% cost reduction with a managed delivery model. Tenacious's 2–3 week placement process is the fastest path to qualified generic-stage engineers.

reply_turns.text: Interesting — could you tell me more about the types of engineers you place?
What does the onboarding look like for a new engineer on our team?
We're actively looking to hire two backend engineers. Can we set up a quick call?

ablation_comparison.note: This generic-segment company falls into the outbound variant that achieved 68% reply rate (research-grounded) vs 52% (generic) in the held-out ablation.
